## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, image pipeline updates, and explore new content opportunities for Monograph.](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Image pipeline being updated to match Monograph's guidelines; articles may be delivered without images this week](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [LookerDash integration for keyword rankings in progress, expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Content prioritization needed soon; Robert to review and update priorities in OS](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Exploring new content types beyond blog posts, including founder-focused content and social media strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [Considering Reddit presence for Monograph, with careful account warming strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

## Topics

### Image Pipeline Updates

  - [Articles may be delivered without images for review](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Shifting to dark backgrounds with white text for better contrast](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Experimenting with inverted color scheme to match Monograph's blog aesthetic](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Considering removal or adjustment of logo placement on images](https://fathom.video/share/ixjSyZWx6AhP4mg9GmADrusTHb2tbZgo?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
